queries.question: What comedians perform for 60 minutes and what magicians perform for same duration?
queries.sql:
SELECT standupcomedians.name
FROM standupcomedians
WHERE standupcomedians.duration_of_performance = 60
UNION
SELECT magicians.name
FROM magicians
WHERE magicians.duration_of_performance = 60

queries.question: Show comedians and magicians who perform for 60 minutes.
queries.sql:
SELECT standupcomedians.name
FROM standupcomedians
UNION
SELECT magicians.name
FROM magicians
WHERE magicians.duration_of_performance = 60
